name: Ron Hira
title: Associate Professor of Political Science
relevance: Leading H-1B researcher, co-authored 'Outsourcing America', frequently cited in H-1B policy debates
source: Academic publications on H-1B visa program
notes: Has published extensively on H-1B wage analysis — our cross-linked data would enhance his research

name: Hal Salzman
title: Professor of Public Policy
relevance: Publishes research on STEM labor markets and H-1B, EPI affiliate, frequent Congressional testimony
notes: Co-authors with Ron Hira on H-1B wage and employer compliance studies

name: Daniel Costa
title: Director of Immigration Law and Policy Research
relevance: EPI's lead H-1B researcher, regularly publishes H-1B employer data analysis
notes: EPI is the go-to source for H-1B policy research — our cross-linked data fills their employer compliance gap
